title: Smorgasbread
description:
A variation of Bread for each Vanilla food type in the game!
Requires Create
body: Smorgasbread is a simple mod that requires Create, all it does is add 9 kinds of Bread made out of the other Vanilla food options in the game. (Potato, Beetroot, Carrot, Melon, Pumpkin, Sweet Berry, Glow Berry, Mushroom and Apple) This is my first mod so if there are gamebreaking bugs please tell. Made with MCreator
